gallery_extra.heading: See the
gallery_extra.subheading: A look at real vehicles we've detailed. Photos are added directly by High School Shine and update automatically.
gallery_extra.instagram_cta: Come see more of our work on Instagram

membership_extra.heading: Shine All
membership_extra.intro: A membership for owners who want their car to always look its best — without thinking about booking it. One refresh detail every 4 weeks, a reserved spot on the calendar, and real perks that add up.
membership_extra.savings_note: That's roughly 18–20% off standard Refresh Detail pricing — plus {add_on_discount} off pet hair and more add-ons to come, every 4 weeks.

contact_extra.heading: Let's get your car
contact_extra.description: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you with availability and a confirmed quote — usually within a few hours.

hero.eyebrow: Premium Mobile Detailing · West Linn, OR
hero.lead: Hand detailing for your car, SUV, or truck — done right where you park it. No drop-off, no waiting rooms, just a showroom finish at home or work.

services.heading: Two packages.
services.subheading: Pricing varies by vehicle size. Every detail is done by hand, on-site, using premium products — and Deluxe builds on everything in Refresh.

deluxe.title: Deluxe Detail
features: Deep wheel, tire & wheel well cleaning
Hand applied and buffed ceramic wax (offers 3+ months of protection)
UV interior protectant on all plastics
deluxe.best_for: Pre-sale, seasonal, cars that have been used heavily

upsell.title: Heavy Pet Hair Removal
upsell.description: homes with pets often need more than a standard vacuum. Add deep pet hair extraction for {refresh_price} with Refresh Detail, or {deluxe_price} with Deluxe Detail (which already includes light pet hair removal).

about_extra.quote: We treat every car like it's about to be judged in a school parking lot — because attention to detail is the whole point.
about_extra.heading: Premium detailing,
about_extra.heading_highlight: built on the basics done right.
about_extra.description: High School Shine is a mobile detailing business based in West Linn, Oregon. We started with one simple idea: every car deserves a real, hands-on detail — not a rushed drive-through wash — without the customer having to go anywhere.

list_items.title: Fully Mobile
list_items.description: We bring our own equipment and come to you — we just need access to a water spigot and an outlet at your home.

list_items.title: Professional-Grade Products
list_items.description: Well researched premium products, trusted by detailers nation wide

list_items.title: Honest Pricing
list_items.description: Two clear packages, priced by vehicle size

list_items.title: For Those Who Serve
list_items.description: First responders, military members, and veterans get 10% off every detail — thank you for what you do.

list_items.title: Giving Back
list_items.description: 5% of profit from every job goes to a charity you choose: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, Big Brothers Big Sisters Columbia Northwest, or Junior Achievement of Oregon & SW Washington. Click on the charities to learn more.
